zh.lifeSummary: 當Patience Pope於1632年5月13日出生在英國戴文宏尼頓時，她的父親John Pope24歲，母親Jane Clapp24歲。她於1653年與Edward Blake在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年8月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可米爾頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patience Pope于1632年5月13日出生在英国戴文宏尼頓时，她的父亲John Pope24岁，母亲Jane Clapp24岁。她于1653年与Edward Blake在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年8月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可米爾頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: Patience
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting one of the Seven Christian Virtues. The vocabulary word is derived from Latin pati ‘to suffer’, and was associated by the early Christians with those who endured persecution and misfortune without complaint or loss of faith. It was a favourite with the Puritans, but fell out of regular use in the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Patience Pope was born on 13 May 1632, in Honiton, Devon, England, her father, John Pope, was 24 and her mother, Jane Clapp, was 24. She married Edward Blake in 1653, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 11 August 1690, in Milton, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patience Pope est née le 13 mai 1632, à Honiton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Pope, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jane Clapp, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Blake en 1653, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 août 1690, à Milton, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patience Pope am 13. Mai 1632 in Honiton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Pope 24 und ihre Mutter Jane Clapp 24. Sie hat 1653 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Edward Blake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. August 1690 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Milton, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patience Pope è nata il il 13 maggio 1632 nel Honiton, Devon, England, sua padre, John Pope, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Jane Clapp, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Edward Blake nel 1653, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 11 agosto 1690, nel Milton, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patience Popeが1632年5月13日にイギリスデボンホーニトンで生まれた時，父John Popeは24歳，母Jane Clappは24歳であった。1653年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでEdward Blakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1690年8月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクミルトンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patience Pope(이)가 1632년 5월 13일 영국 데폰 호니턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Pope(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Clapp(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1653년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Edward Blake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 8월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 미턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patience Pope nasceu em 13 de maio de 1632, em Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Pope, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jane Clapp, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Blake em 1653, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1690, em Milton, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patience Pope родилась 13 мая 1632 г. в местности хонитон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Pope было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Clapp, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Blake в 1653 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 11 августа 1690 г. в местности милтон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patience Pope nació el 13 de mayo de 1632, en Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Pope, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jane Clapp, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Edward Blake en 1653, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1690, en Milton, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 58 años.
